hero.headline: Specialty coffee with a farmer's soul
hero.subheadline: We grow, process and share the finest single-origin coffee, with the passion of those who know every tree by name.

mission.title: Who we are
mission.text: The Cupping Farmer was born from a love of the land and an obsession with quality. We are farmers, cuppers and specialty coffee enthusiasts. Every bean tells a story: the farm, the harvest, the hands that nurture it.

values.title: Traceable origin
values.text: We know every lot from seed to packaging.

values.title: Sensory quality
values.text: Rigorous cupping at every stage to ensure unique flavor profiles.

values.title: Coffee community
values.text: We work hand in hand with local and sustainable farmers.

about.title: Our story
about.subtitle: From the farm to the world
about.story_title: The origin of The Cupping Farmer
about.story:
It all started with a simple question: why does the world's best coffee come from our lands, but never reaches our tables in its finest form?

The Cupping Farmer was born to bridge that gap. We are farmers who learned to cup, cuppers who returned to the land. We combine the technical knowledge of specialty coffee with the real experience of working the soil.

Today we work with selected farms, process with rigor and share the result with people who love coffee as much as we do.
